name: Dominaria United

draft.notes: 10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 land + ad card. If a foil appears it comes after the rare and displaces a common (becomes 9 commons). Each pack contains exactly one (non-foil) legendary creature, which may occupy the third uncommon slot or the rare slot.

statedRates: Foil 1:45 cards. In 3/4 of packs the third uncommon is a legendary creature; in 1/4 the rare is the legendary creature.
sourceNotes: Large set, normal size for era. Four variations of each basic land. Printed in USA, Belgium, Japan; US printing modeled. 36 packs per box. Guaranteed-legend mechanic: legendary creatures form their own uncommon run.
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/dmu.json.
